description_long: This object is a rectangular stone guard stone featuring a detailed coat of arms relief and an inscription on its front face. The front is adorned with ornate carvings, including a shield with six roundels, a helmet, and decorative foliage, all rendered in high relief. Below the heraldic emblem, there is a block of inscribed text in a serifed, classical style, likely commemorative or dedicatory in nature. The sides and back of the stone are rough-hewn and unadorned, contrasting with the smooth, worked front. The top surface is flat, while the overall form is robust and solid, typical of historical boundary or protective stones. The stone shows signs of age, with some surface wear and minor chipping, especially along the edges.
description: A rectangular stone guard stone with a carved coat of arms and inscription on its front, featuring ornate relief and a weathered, solid appearance.
description_view_0: The front view displays the detailed coat of arms and inscribed text, with ornate relief and a smooth, finished surface.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a rough, unworked stone surface with no carvings or inscriptions.
description_view_2: The top-down view shows the flat upper surface and the depth of the carved relief on the front face.
description_view_3: The right side view presents a smoother, but still plain, stone surface with no visible decoration.
attribute_location: Typically placed at the entrance to driveways, historical sites, or along urban street corners to protect building edges or mark boundaries.
attribute_installation_orientation: Meant to be installed fully above ground, standing upright with the inscribed face visible to passersby.
attribute_wear_patterns: Visible minor chipping and smoothing along the edges and corners, likely caused by incidental vehicle contact and prolonged weather exposure. The front face may show some erosion or fading of the inscription due to rain and wind.
attribute_historical_markings: The front face features a carved coat of arms with a shield, helmet, and decorative foliage, as well as a block of inscribed text in a classical serif style.
